_comment: Example config for cmd/parser-worker. JSON does not support comments, so _comment fields are documentation and are ignored by the Go loader.

nats._comment: The parser consumes jobs.description.fetched and publishes jobs.parsed into this stream.

sqlite._comment: SQLite database file where fetched descriptions and parsed requirements are stored.

consumer._comment: Durable pull consumer settings for jobs.description.fetched.

parser._comment: Additional skill names to detect beyond the built-in deterministic list.
